ast.name: alert
ast.source: Due to changes this version cannot uncompress this file. Please go back to 1.1.0 and convert.
ast.target: 由于更改，此版本无法解压缩此文件。请回退到 1.1.0 并进行转换。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Complete. The cursor will be invisible, press off of obsidian and back.
ast.target: 完成。光标将不可见，请离开 Obsidian 再返回。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to convert

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Everytime you're in a ctxt file and it gets saved itll then print out the compression ratio and byte save.
ast.target: 每次您在 ctxt 文件中并保存时，它都会打印出压缩率和字节节省量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of storage a file is taking up will be shown in the status bar of the open file.
ast.target: 文件占用的存储量将显示在打开文件的状态栏中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unfortunetly the graph view will not maintain links. The graph cannot read the compressed data. Nor if the links are raw
ast.target: 遗憾的是，图形视图将无法维护链接。图形无法读取压缩数据。即使链接是原始的也不行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toasts all the events that are happening. Useful for debugging.
ast.target: 显示所有正在发生的事件的 Toast 通知。对调试很有用。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show the file storage size in the statusbar
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示文件存储大小

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create a new ctxt file in root
ast.target: 在根目录创建新的 ctxt 文件
